headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Essex Property Trust, Lowers Price Target to $264
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $269 to $264.
